title: Playable Snake: Pulse Coil
objective: Memorize the snake's pulse pattern, replay it scale by scale, and keep the combo alive through short escalating rounds to post the highest score.

controls.input: Tap the lit scale in sequence
controls.outcome: Advances the pattern and scores points

controls.input: Press and hold anywhere during a hollow ring cue
controls.outcome: Correctly plays a silent gap instead of a tap

controls.input: Tap the left or right forked head when the path splits
controls.outcome: Locks in the next branch of the pattern and can boost the multiplier

steps: A curled snake flashes a short pulse pattern across its body while matching tones play.
The player repeats the pattern by tapping the same scales in order before the round timer expires.
Every successful round adds one more beat and slightly increases tempo.
Every few rounds the snake throws a readable twist: a hollow ring means a hold-rest beat, or the head forks and the player must choose which
scoring: Each correct beat scores base points. Perfect rounds raise a combo multiplier up to x8. Picking the harder forked path adds a brief bonus window and extra multiplier, but one wrong tap, wrong hold, wrong fork, or timeout
tips: Use the sound as much as the light; later rounds hide information in the rhythm.
Hold-rest beats are safer to spot if you watch for the hollow pulse instead of the scale glow.
Forked paths appear fast, but the riskier branch always pays more if your combo is already high.
Short sessions favor aggression: one clean streak beats cautious low-value play.

trendContext.title: Playable Snake game in the browser – no downloads, works on mobile
